label: Fetch to Storage
description: Download a file from a URL straight into execution storage and emit a file reference. The bytes stream directly into storage (never buffered whole), so it handles large files. Wire `file` into ImageDisplay, DownloadLink, KeepFile, or any node that takes a stored file.

inputs.name: url
inputs.description: URL of the file to fetch.

inputs.name: filename
inputs.description: Override the stored filename. Defaults to the URL's last path segment.

outputs.name: file
outputs.description: Self-describing reference to the stored file (any type).

fields.label: Keep past the run
fields.description: Store the file already flagged to survive the execution-end sweep (30-day access-extended TTL).
